'''鈭歴-r-n''' ('''sarana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yard|yard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yard|yard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| sarana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:saranithi|saranithi]] || [[word:saraniji|saraniji]] || [[word:saranishi|saranishi]] || [[word:sarani|sarani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:saranuthuth|saranuthuth]] || [[word:saranujuj|saranujuj]] || [[word:saranushush|saranushush]] || [[word:saran|saran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:saranuthu|saranuthu]] || [[word:saranuju|saranuju]] || [[word:saranushu|saranushu]] || [[word:saranu|saranu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:saranufuth|saranufuth]] || [[word:saranufuj|saranufuj]] || [[word:saranufush|saranufush]] || [[word:saranuf|saranuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:saranethe|saranethe]] || [[word:saraneje|saraneje]] || [[word:saraneshe|saraneshe]] || [[word:sarane|sarane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:saranothoth|saranothoth]] || [[word:saranojoj|saranojoj]] || [[word:saranoshosh|saranoshosh]] || [[word:saran|saran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:saranotho|saranotho]] || [[word:saranojo|saranojo]] || [[word:saranosho|saranosho]] || [[word:sarano|sarano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:saranofoth|saranofoth]] || [[word:saranofoj|saranofoj]] || [[word:saranofosh|saranofosh]] || [[word:saranof|saranof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:saran忙th忙|saran忙th忙]] || [[word:saran忙j忙|saran忙j忙]] || [[word:saran忙sh忙|saran忙sh忙]] || [[word:saran忙|saran忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:saranathath|saranathath]] || [[word:saranajaj|saranajaj]] || [[word:saranashash|saranashash]] || [[word:saran|saran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:saranatha|saranatha]] || [[word:saranaja|saranaja]] || [[word:saranasha|saranasha]] || [[word:sarana|sarana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:saranafath|saranafath]] || [[word:saranafaj|saranafaj]] || [[word:saranafash|saranafash]] || [[word:saranaf|saranaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:saranasha|saranasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosaranasha|gosaranasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisaranasha|gokisaranasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:saran眉sha|saran眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosarankn眉sha|gosarankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisaran眉sha|gokisaran眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:saransh毛sha|saransh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosaranksh毛sha|gosaranksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisaransh毛sha|gokisaransh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:saranrosha|saranrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosarankrosha|gosarankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisaranrosha|gokisaranrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:saranmusha|saranmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosarankmusha|gosarankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaranmusha|gokisaranmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:saransherasha|saransherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosaranksherasha|gosaranksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisaransherasha|gokisaransherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sarangasha|sarangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosarankngasha|gosarankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisarangasha|gokisarangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:saranyasha|saranyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosarankyasha|gosarankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisaranyasha|gokisaranyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:saranyamasha|saranyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosarankyamasha|gosarankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisaranyamasha|gokisaranyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:saran眉sh毛sha|saran眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosarankn眉sh毛sha|gosarankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisaran眉sh毛sha|gokisaran眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:saran眉rosha|saran眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosarankn眉rosha|gosarankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisaran眉rosha|gokisaran眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saran眉musha|saran眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosarankn眉musha|gosarankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaran眉musha|gokisaran眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:saransh毛n眉sha|saransh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosaranksh毛n眉sha|gosaranksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisaransh毛n眉sha|gokisaransh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:saransh毛rosha|saransh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosaranksh毛rosha|gosaranksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisaransh毛rosha|gokisaransh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saransh毛musha|saransh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosaranksh毛musha|gosaranksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaransh毛musha|gokisaransh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:saranron眉sha|saranron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosarankron眉sha|gosarankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisaranron眉sha|gokisaranron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:saranrosh毛sha|saranrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosarankrosh毛sha|gosarankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisaranrosh毛sha|gokisaranrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saranromusha|saranromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosarankromusha|gosarankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaranromusha|gokisaranromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:saranmun眉sha|saranmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosarankmun眉sha|gosarankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisaranmun眉sha|gokisaranmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:saranmush毛sha|saranmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosarankmush毛sha|gosarankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisaranmush毛sha|gokisaranmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:saranmurosha|saranmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosarankmurosha|gosarankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisaranmurosha|gokisaranmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:saran|saran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙r忙n|s忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosaran|hosaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙r忙n|hos忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosaran|hohosaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙r忙n|hohos忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉saran|n眉saran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙r忙n|n眉s忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉saran|n眉n眉saran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙r忙n|n眉n眉s忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂saran|n茂saran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙r忙n|n茂s忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂saran|n茂n茂saran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙r忙n|n茂n茂s忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusaran|lusaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙r忙n|lus忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusaran|lulusaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙r忙n|lulus忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisaran|lisaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙r忙n|lis忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisaran|lilisaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙r忙n|lilis忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosaran|kosaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙r忙n|kos忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosaran|kokosaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙r忙n|kokos忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesaran|kesaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙r忙n|kes忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesaran|kekesaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙r忙n|kekes忙r忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
